label: Place
description: Defines a place of origin used by ideoligion generation. PlaceDefs provide origin tags and grammar rules for generated place names, summaries, communities, jobs, weapons, and enemies.

placeRules.label: Place rules
placeRules.description: Inline grammar rules added to ideoligion name and text generation when this place is selected.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: Origin tags used to match this place against CultureDef.allowedPlaceTags. These are plain strings, not Def references.

basic-place.label: Basic place
basic-place.description: Minimal place with one origin tag and an inline RulePack.
